artPrompt: The dramatic moment a hand draws three blank documents from a towering cabinet drawer while a fourth, lifted into the cold beam, dissolves into heavy black redaction, its smudged surface swallowed by darkness. Pale arcane glow bleeds from the open drawer. The wide frame stacks paper into receding gloom, one harsh light source isolating the act, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Freedom of Information Request
text:
Draw three cards. Then redact one of them: choose a card you drew this way and exile it face down. (The public has a right to know. Most of it.)
You may pay {3} to unredact (return the exiled card to your hand) at any time. The request is, regrettably, still being processed.
flavorText: Released in full, except for the parts, which were most of it.
